articles.title: Binance, CZ, BitBoy Crypto Dragged Into New $1 Billion Lawsuit
articles.description: Binance and crypto influencers like Ben 'Bitboy' Armstrong have been dragged into a new $1 billion class-action lawsuit.

articles.title: Arbitrum (ARB) Price Drops 11% as Foundation Sells 50M Tokens For Stablecoins
articles.description: Arbitrum's decentralized governance plan is off to a rocky start after the Foundation started selling ARB tokens without community approval.
